overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city arcade from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring dynamic neon ceiling lighting that shifts through purple, blue, green, and red hues. The camera moves through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with digital billboards and vending machines, eventually reaching an elevated overlook of a wet, neon-lit city street with passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with dynamic neon ceiling

events.description: ceiling lighting transitions from purple to blue-cyan hue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade following a pedestrian in white clothing ahead

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking ahead of camera along the arcade

entered.detail: long rectangular ceiling panels emitting purple and blue neon light
industrial metal staircase with railings leading to upper level
large illuminated advertising displays mounted on the left wall
yellow vending machine with 'enjoy!' branding and face graphic
modern concrete seating along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic covered pedestrian arcade with reflective tiled flooring and a glowing neon ceiling that shifts from purple to blue. The camera follows a person in white clothing walking ahead, passing metal staircases on the right and illuminated digital billboards on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian arcade with palm tree planters and digital advertising pillars

events.description: passing the pedestrian in white who is now seated on a bench to the right
ceiling lighting shifts to green-cyan hue illuminating the palm tree area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the arcade past palm tree planters and concrete seating areas

notable_agents.action: person in camouflage jacket and jeans walking toward the camera
person in white outfit sitting on concrete bench

entered.detail: large rectangular planters containing palm trees and tropical greenery
square structural pillars wrapped with digital advertisements

segments.scene_description: The arcade transitions to a section featuring palm tree planters and concrete benches under a green-lit ceiling. The camera passes a pedestrian in a camouflage jacket walking in the opposite direction, while the previous pedestrian in white is now seen resting on a bench to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching elevated street overlook with red lighting

events.description: ceiling shifts to orange-red hues signaling approach to the street opening
approaching the open railing overlooking the wet city street below

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the covered walkway where it opens to reveal the street below

entered.detail: metal and glass safety railing overlooking the multi-lane street below
rain-slicked asphalt road with lane markings visible below the walkway

segments.scene_description: The walkway transitions to an orange-red lit zone as it approaches an open overlook. The camera moves toward a glass and metal railing revealing a wet city street below, with futuristic glass buildings and digital billboards visible across the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking neon-lit city intersection

events.description: red sports cars drive past on the wet street below the overlook
green truck and other vehicles visible at the intersection below

agents.ego_description: moving along the railing observing the traffic and neon cityscape below

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving on the wet road below the overlook
green truck waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
large floating digital billboards displaying advertisements on building facades
street lights and traffic signals along the road below

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a sweeping view of the cyberpunk city street from the elevated walkway. The camera moves along the railing, observing red sports cars and other vehicles driving on the rain-reflective road below, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic pedestrian arcade that gradually opens into a sweeping overlook of a neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins on reflective tiled flooring under a ceiling shifting from purple to blue, following a person in white past metal staircases and glowing digital billboards. As the camera advances, the environment transitions into a green-lit zone featuring palm tree planters and concrete benches where pedestrians cross paths. The walkway then shifts toward an orange-red glow as it approaches a glass and metal railing, revealing a wet city street and towering glass buildings below. Finally, the view expands along the railing to showcase red sports cars driving on rain-reflective roads surrounded by skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements.
